name: E2E: each kind is routed to the proper FOSS enforcement tool â€” typescriptâ†’eslint, terraformâ†’checkov, proseâ†’architectural-content bundle
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title x --prose 'TypeScript .ts interface rule' --json > c.json 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/route-rule.sh" --in c.json --json > r.json 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title y --prose 'Terraform .tf resource block rule' --json > c2.json 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/route-rule.sh" --in c2.json --json > r2.json 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/classify-rule.sh" --title z --prose 'design decision architecture decision record rationale' --json > c3.json 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/route-rule.sh" --in c3.json --json > r3.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const a=require(process.cwd()+"/r.json").enforced_by,b=require(process.cwd()+"/r2.json").enforced_by,c=require(process.cwd()+"/r3.json").enforced_by;const e=a.find(x=>x.tool==="eslint");if(!e||e.license!=="MIT")process.exit(1);if(!b.some(x=>x.tool==="checkov"))process.exit(1);if(!c.some(x=>x.bundle==="architectural-content"))process.exit(1)' && echo e2e3-routed-to-proper-tools 1>&2
